description: Production image-provider priority for SWCA Twin Card avatar generation. Use approved fal.ai image-edit providers first, then Bedrock inference profile IDs, before falling back to the normalized uploaded photo.

fal-ai/nano-banana-2/edit.purpose: Approved production primary provider for likeness-preserving 2D wellness avatar generation.
fal-ai/nano-banana-2/edit.invocation: Direct HTTPS POST to https://fal.run/fal-ai/nano-banana-2/edit using a short-lived presigned S3 source-image URL.

openai/gpt-image-2/edit.purpose: Approved production secondary provider behind Nano Banana 2 Edit.
openai/gpt-image-2/edit.invocation: Direct HTTPS POST to https://fal.run/openai/gpt-image-2/edit using a short-lived presigned S3 source-image URL.

us.stability.stable-image-control-struct.purpose: Preserve the selfie structure while generating a clean 2D wellness avatar.
us.stability.stable-image-control-struct.bedrockInvocation: InvokeModel through the active US inference profile ID.

us.stability.stable-style-transfer-v1:0.purpose: Apply a VeeVee reference avatar style to the uploaded selfie after a style reference image is configured.
us.stability.stable-style-transfer-v1:0.bedrockInvocation: InvokeModel through the active US inference profile ID.

us.stability.stable-image-style-guide-v1.purpose: Keep avatar outputs aligned to a brand look when direct structure generation is unavailable.
us.stability.stable-image-style-guide-v1.bedrockInvocation: InvokeModel through the active US inference profile ID.

fallback_original_photo_card.purpose: Use the normalized uploaded photo inside the premium card frame when AI generation cannot produce a usable image.

notes: Nano Banana 2 Edit and GPT Image 2 Edit are approved for the production Twin Card avatar-generation path as of 2026-05-27.
Never hardcode provider credentials. The production Lambda reads the fal.ai key from Secrets Manager secret /myveevee/twin-card/fal-key.
fal.ai calls must pass only a short-lived presigned S3 source-image URL and must store request id, latency, billable units, unit price, estimated cost, and provider audit metadata in DDB/run JSON.
Do not use amazon.nova-canvas-v1:0 for expo V1; it is legacy in the production account and was denied by Bedrock.
Do not move to amazon.titan-image-generator-v2:0 as the next default; it is also legacy.
Style Transfer should become the preferred branded option only after a strong VeeVee avatar style reference image is configured.
